arts.ttl: 'He can smell danger' - is Merino Arsenal's striker solution?
arts.sum: Mikel Merino makes his case to be Arsenal's striker solution after his match-winning heroics in the vital win at Leicester City, says BBC Sport Chief Football Writer Phil McNulty

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes Ethan Nwaneri statement that sums up Arsenal's obvious issue
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri was a class above as Arsenal battled to a win at Leicester despite Mikel Arteta admitting their attackers - bar the teenage star - struggled to impact the game

arts.ttl: Player reveals concrete interest from Arsenal and Manchester United early in career – Chose different career path
arts.sum: Former Feyenoord favourite Luis Pedro has revealed he turned down approaches from Arsenal and Manchester United early in his career, as he was determined to play for the Dutch club. Feyenoord Pings cover comments from the 34-year-old today made in an interview with Voetbal Primeur’s De Voetbalweek. arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri: Arsenal wonderkid paid the ultimate compliment after 'Lionel Messi like' moments
arts.sum: Nwaneri claimed an assist for Arsenal’s first goal against Leicester

arts.ttl: Can Calafiori play up front for Arsenal? Arteta: ‘It is an option’ – video
arts.sum: Arsenal coach Mikel Arteta did not deny the fact that Riccardo Calafiori has what it...

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta: We need more like super sub Mikel Merino
arts.sum: Merino scored two late goals for Arsenal at Leicester.

arts.ttl: Arsenal goal hero Mikel Merino dedicates his match-winning double to his wife... after admitting he 'forgot to buy her something for Valentine's Day'
arts.sum: Mikel Merino netted twice for Arsenal in their 2-0 win over Leicester on Saturday, and dedicated his brace to his wife, whom he forgot to buy a gift for on Valentine's Day.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends warning to Liverpool as Arsenal secret weapon downs Leicester
arts.sum: Arsenal cut the gap to Liverpool on Saturday as they just squeezed past Leicester at the King Power Stadium with the Premier League title race just about alive with 13 games of the season to go

arts.ttl: 27-year-old Arsenal ace agrees mega pay deal
arts.sum: He’s surplus to requirements at Arsenal, but Kieran Tierney has agreed a megabucks deal with Celtic where he’ll be the best paid player. The agreement for Tierney to move north of the border has been in place for a while now, but Mikel Arteta refused to allow the player to leave in the summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal double team news hint before Leicester City as Mikel Arteta faces huge dilemma
arts.sum: Arteta was asked at his pre-match press conference on Friday how he will deal without the injured Havertz, admitting that it is a significant blow to his team. And some Arsenal players have hinted they will feature in Saturday's match at the King Power Stadium.
